content: curl|bash risks: (1) MITM if no HTTPS/pin; (2) truncated download executes partial script. Glibc mismatch: binary compiled on ubuntu-22.04 (glibc 2.35) fails on CentOS 7 (glibc 2.17). Solutions: build in manylinux2014 container (glibc 2.17) or use musl target (aarch64-unknown-linux-musl). musl trades off: slightly larger binary, no jemalloc, potential perf difference. For a TUI tool the tradeoff is fine. Install script must detect arch (uname -m) and map to binary name.
